description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean, white exterior walls and large, black-framed windows. The structure is two stories tall, with the upper floor partially cantilevered over the lower level, creating a shaded area beneath. Wooden pergolas extend from both the front and side, providing semi-covered outdoor spaces and adding visual interest to the geometric form. The roof is flat, and the house sits on a rectangular plot of green grass, suggesting a suburban or urban setting. Window arrangements are asymmetrical, with a mix of large picture windows and smaller, rectangular openings. The main entryway is defined by a double-height glass facade and a wooden pergola, giving the entrance a welcoming and contemporary feel.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roof, large black-framed windows, and wooden pergolas extending from the front and side. The design features clean lines, asymmetrical window placement, and a cantilevered upper floor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the double-height glass facade, main entryway, and a prominent wooden pergola extending from the front.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the cantilevered upper floor, a large balcony with a wooden pergola, and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the flat, unadorned white walls, two small windows, and the side pergola structure.
description_view_3: Opposite front view displays the large black-framed windows, the front pergola, and the overhanging upper story.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and small rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a double-height glass facade, wooden pergola, and no visible steps, emphasizing a sleek, open, and contemporary look.
